notes: It runs with a dosbox and is partially playable. Had some input and stability issues, but I could play a little.
title: STAR WARS™: Rebel Assault I + II
STAR WARS™: Rebel Assault I + II

notes: I did play this not with Proton, but with the steam-dos wrapper (native dosbox: https://github.com/dreamer/steam-dos) and with a Steam controller . So far I only played game 1 which does have a random Steam controller detection (from "very good" over "acceptable" to "not at all"). But the game is generally playable with native dosbox! It may need several starts though. Did only test the sound on game 2 (which worked).
title: STAR WARS™: Rebel Assault I + II
